---
title: "Home"
---

::: {.home-hero}

::: {.home-copy}

::: {.hero-badge}
Boston University · Marketing Analytics · Market Intelligence
:::

# Alina Chen

## Turning market signals into meaningful business decisions.

I combine **marketing intuition**, **business analytics**, and **cross-cultural experience** to understand customers, markets, and growth opportunities.

::: {.hero-actions}
[View Projects](projects.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[About Me](about.qmd){.btn .btn-secondary}
:::

:::

::: {.home-visual}
![](assets/Graduation%20headshot.jpg){.home-photo}

::: {.floating-card .card-one}
Market Intelligence
:::

::: {.floating-card .card-two}
Data Storytelling
:::

:::

:::
